hooks.command: if [ -f package.json ] && [ ! -d node_modules ]; then echo 'spicet-app: installing dependencies (node_modules missing)...'; if [ -f package-lock.json ]; then inst='npm ci --no-audit --no-fund'; else inst='npm install --no-audit --no-fund'; fi; n=0; until [ "$n" -ge 3 ]; do $inst >/dev/null 2>&1 && break; n=$((n+1)); echo "spicet-app: install attempt $n failed, retrying in $((n*3))s..."; sleep $((n*3)); done; if [ -d node_modules ]; then echo 'spicet-app: dependencies ready.'; else echo 'spicet-app: npm install failed after retries — run it manually.'; fi; fi
